ham.subject: Jira Ticket #12345 Resolved - Code Review Done
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just wanted to let you know that the Jira ticket #12345 for the login module has been resolved. The code review is complete and the changes have been merged into the develop branch. I have also updated the GitHub PR #6789 with the new commits.

Please pull the latest changes and run the tests locally. If you encounter any issues, let me know.

Thanks,
Rahul

---
Project Lead

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Gift Card Needed for CEO Approval
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to inform you that the finance department has requested an urgent gift card to be sent to the CEO for the upcoming quarterly presentation. This is a mandatory requirement for the board meeting scheduled next week.

Please provide the gift card details (amount: ₹5,000) and confirm the delivery address as soon as possible. Failure to comply may result in a delay in the presentation and could affect the company’s reputation.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Ankit Kumar
Finance Officer
